headings: CinCin is a feast of the senses. Savour Executive Chef Andrew Richardson’s modern Italian cuisine, prepared over CinCin’s Grillworks Infierno, a two-metre stainless steel station that features an impressive grill and rotisserie – where freshest market fish and prime cuts of meat are deliciously rendered over fruitwood charcoal. Our seasonal salads and nuanced housemade pastas are Vancouver icons, perfect companions to our famous wine list crafted by award-winning Wine Director Shane Taylor.

Renowned Executive Chef Andrew Richardson believes the essence of Italian cuisine is cooking in rhythm with the seasons, allowing fresh, local ingredients to shine. His inaugural cookbook, CinCin: Wood-Fired Cucina , Chef Richardson showcases the restaurant’s signature wood-oven cooking techniques and his traditional Italian dishes married with seasonal west coast flavours. learn more here AWARDS Best Italian Cuisine Book, National Gourmand World Cookbook Awards

https://restaurantsuhring.com/reservatio.description: ⁠Reservations are accepted up to 60 days in advance.We recommend making a reservation 1 month ahead to secure your table. If your requested date is not available, you may add yourself to the waitlist. If you have any dietary restrictions, please share them with us when making your reservation and we will do our best to accommodate. We sincerely regret that we are currently unable to cater to dairy & egg allergies or intolerances, and are grateful for your understanding. We welcome young guests aged 6 and above. Prices listed are not inclusive of VAT and service charge. ⁠We understand that plans may change, and we’ll do our best to accommodate adjustments. However, no-shows or cancellations within 48 hours of your reservation may incur a fee of 5800 THB per person. We are pleased to welcome one external bottle (750ml) per table, provided one bottle is purchased from our wine list. Each additional external bottle opened will incur a corkage fee of 3,000 THB++ (per 750ml bottle). Our dress code is smart casual though we strongly recommend dressing up for the occasion. Gentlemen, we ask that you come dressed in trousers and appropriate footwear. For larger parties, please call us at +66 2107 2777 or email us at reservation@restaurantsuhring.com

https://rougecalgary.com/.title: Rouge Calgary
https://rougecalgary.com/.description: The garden’s seasonal yield travels directly from soil to plate , guided by the creative intuition of its culinary hospitality team. Seasonal menus , a curated wine list and the warm personalities of Dean, Rey, Paul and Olivier craft an atmosphere that’s always welcoming.
headings: A table that’s set to the tune of every season
A refined, historic Inglewood restaurant that delivers garden-fresh, seasonally inspired cuisine housed in one of Calgary’s oldest Victorian estates.
Our sanctuary in Inglewood: Rouge invites you to savour the season.
At Rouge, guests step back into Calgary’s original main street, settling into a lovingly restored Victorian farmhouse where every bite bridges history, hospitality and homegrown flavour.
From upcoming events to behind-the-scenes moments, wild harvests and community collaborations, this is where we share the stories that connect our table to the land – and to you.

https://tantris.de/.meta_description: Tantris Maison Culinaire mit dem Gourmetrestaurant Tantris, dem Restaurant Tantris DNA und der Bar Tantris ist Deutschlands Top-Adresse für Gourmetküche.
headings: Tantris Maison Culinaire ist Handwerk, große Kochkunst und gelebte Gastfreundschaft.

Seit 1971 bewegt Tantris die Kulinarik in Deutschland. Nach einer behutsamen Erneuerung unseres Hauses schreiben wir nun die Tantris-Geschichte weiter. Als Tantris Maison Culinaire. Mit dem Menü-Restaurant Tantris, dem reinen À-la-carte-Restaurant Tantris DNA und der Bar Tantris unter einem Dach in München. Verbunden sind sie durch die Atmosphäre eines ganz besonderen Raums. Und eine ganzheitliche Philosophie, die unsere Vergangenheit und Zukunft ist: Wir wollen mit Handwerk, großer Kochkunst und gelebter Gastfreundschaft den Stellenwert des Genusses verändern.
„Wahre Küche ist keine Kopfsache. Sie kommt aus dem Herzen.“

Compact, simple restaurant with a western soundtrack, for African-inspired vegetables, grilled and smoked meats, flatbreads, pickles and natural wine. Blowing up like bubblegum. Africola living. We buy gold. We take inspo from all the places with bias toward Africa – north to south, we also pull from more familiar cooking techniques. We smoke then baste our foods in their own juices. Our menu changes regularly to reflect seasonality
headings: Africola is a multiple award winning South Australian restaurant, housed in a colourful, heritage-listed East End building, we’re the home of good times in Adelaide.
The restaurant is centred around our open-plan kitchen and wood-fire oven – with big flavours, smoke, and spice at the heart of everything we do.

Chef Duncan Welgemoed’s approach to food is described as fearless, take-no-prisoners, bold and exciting. A menu of African-inspired vegetables, grilled and smoked meats, flatbreads, pickles, ferments, vegan-inspired desserts served with inspired cocktails and natural wine.

https://www.deine-brasserie.de/brasserie.title: Brasserie: Deine Brasserie
https://www.deine-brasserie.de/brasserie.description: In unseren Brasserien genießt du französische Lebensart. Nach dem klassischen Vor­bild der tradi­tionellen Kaffeehäuser Frankreichs, zaubern lichtdurchflutete, nos­talgische Bleiglasdecken, glänzendes Messing und warmes Holz französisches Ambiente, das dich zum Verweilen einlädt. Französische Lebenslust und „Savoir Vivre“ spiegeln sich auch in unseren Speisen und Getränken wider.

Chef & Owner Lee Cooper and his team offer a Michelin Recommended dining experience with both a Chef’s Tasting Menu a
https://www.labattoir.ca/.meta_description: Located in Vancouver in the heart of historic Gastown, L’Abattoir offers elevated French-influenced West Coast cuisine alongside an award-winning wine program and cocktail list. Chef & Owner Lee Cooper and his team offer a Michelin Recommended dining experience with both a Chef’s Tasting Menu and a seasonal a la carte menu.
headings: Located in historic Gastown and on the site of Vancouver’s first jail and once the heart of the city’s meat packing district - L’Abattoir is a refined nod to the neighbourhood’s gritty past. The restaurant has earned critical acclaim, including being Michelin Recommended since 2022.

Helmed by Chef Jasper Cruickshank, the menu blends French technique with West Coast ingredients. Set in a 19th-century brick-and-beam building, the space showcases classic French tile, warm wood, and industrial accents, with options to dine at the bar, the mezzanine or the light-drenched atrium.

With a Platinum Award-winning wine list recognized by the Vancouver International Wine Festival, a polished cocktail program, and hospitality-driven service, L’Abattoir has remained one of Vancouver’s most compelling dining destinations for over 15 years.

https://www.manuelgrabner.at/.description: im Restaurant Holzpoldl bei Manuel Grabner und Claudia Stiglitz... ...an einem Ort zum Wohlfühlen, Genießen und Ankommen Treten Sie ein... Der Genussort von Manuel Grabner und Claudia Stiglitz im idyllischen Lichtenberg präsentiert eine kulinarische Gratwanderung zwischen Tradition und Fine Dining – mit sehr viel Leidenschaft, mit Herzblut, mit echter Hingabe. Altbewährte Rezepte treffen dabei auf exklusive Gourmet-Erlebnisse und harmonieren trotz oder gerade aufgrund der Gegensätze. In der geradlinigen Küche von Manuel Grabner geht es um ehrliche, unverschnörkelte Gerichte .

https://www.masalaymaiz.com/.title: Masala y Maiz
https://www.masalaymaiz.com/.description: The restaurant is a reflection of the chefs’ beliefs that food can be used as a powerful tool for environmental & social justice and that chefs have the responsibility to advocate and work towards bettering labor conditions for everyone in the food industry.
https://www.masalaymaiz.com/.meta_description: Masala y Maiz is a Mexico City based restaurant by Chefs Norma Listman & Saqib Keval exploring the complex migration of ingredients, cooking techniques & food cultures between Mexico, India & East Africa. The restaurant features a research kitchen, chef residency program and a singular long table where the chefs serve dishes meant to share. This is not fusion; this is Mestizaje.
headings: El Restaurante Como Eje De Cambio

https://www.mitocaya.com/.title: Mi Tocaya
https://www.mitocaya.com/.description: The thoughtfully composed menu features a progression of small, medium and large plates composed of Davila’s takes on familiar Mexican favorites; less known regional specialties; and completely new dishes that are inspired by her Mexican heritage.
https://www.mitocaya.com/.meta_description: Mi Tocaya Antojeria is a neighborhood Mexican restaurant located in Logan Square, from acclaimed Chef Diana Davila. Mi Tocaya, or “my namesake” in Spanish, is commonly used as a term of endearment when someone has the same name as oneself. Through food & drink, guests will be invited to share in Davila’s cherished memories of her summers and extensive travels throughout Mexico with her family. The thoughtfully composed menu features a progression of small, medium and large plates composed of Davila’s takes on familiar Mexican favorites; less known regional specialties; and completely new dishes that are inspired by her Mexican heritage.
headings: an antojeria that pays homage to our ancestors, HONORS WOMEN & OUR TIERRa

https://www.olespanishrestaurant.com.hk/.title: Ole Spanish Restaurant |
https://www.olespanishrestaurant.com.hk/.description: Opened since 1998 in Hong Kong as the brain-child of veteran restaurant, Mr. Carmelo Lopez. A native Spanish himself, he came to Asia in the 70’s but was still nostalgically attached to the richness and exquisite taste of the cuisine of his motherland. Ole was created from this crave for authenticity! Just experience the genuine touch of Spain the moment you step inside the restaurant: the lemon yellow plastered walls and glazed terracotta tiles of the Mediterranean, the lighting fixture and the decorative potteries directly flown from Spain. All these elements combined to recreate a unique and cozy atmosphere that goes hand in hand for the enjoyment one of the world’s finest cuisines. The extensive variety of delicacies, perfect with the Spanish wines, sangria or chilled beers. Live guitar music throughout the evening gracefully exhilarates a relaxing and enjoyable mood.

https://www.zash.it/ristorante-e-bar.description: In uno spazio speciale dove il tempo si è fermato si riesce a dare spazio a suoni, odori e sapori della natura. È così che intorno e dentro la vasca, dove un tempo si fermentava il vino, s’inserisce il piccolo e suggestivo ristorante. Un luogo sospeso dove vivere l’esperienza dei sapori lasciandosi trasportare da recondite atmosfere. In questo scenario lo chef Giuseppe Raciti, Stella Michelin 2026, crea nuove storie culinarie, in quel connubio unico e irreperibile fatto di creatività, tradizione e territorio.

https://zekitchengalerie.fr/restaurant/z.title: Ze Kitchen Galerie | Ze Kitchen Galerie
https://zekitchengalerie.fr/restaurant/z.description: Le goût de l’art et l’art du goût. Cuisine ouverte sur le monde et espace d’art contemporain, l’inclassable premier restaurant de William Ledeuil a ouvert ses portes en 2001. Le guide Michelin lui décerne une 1ère étoile en 2008 et le Gault&Millau lui attribue une note de 16,5.Le cadre, urbain et arty, a été imaginé par son ami Daniel Humair, jazzman et peintre. La sobriété des lieux et du mobilier conçu par le designer Léopold Gest offre aux toiles de Daniel Humair et de Tony Soulié un bel espace d’expression.Partout présent, l’art est également au menu. Chaque assiette met en scène une composition de formes et de couleurs que l’on savoure d’abord avec les yeux.Les convives suivent le spectacle qui se joue dans la cuisine ouverte. Le chef Paul Andréjac et son équipe cosmopolite y élaborent en direct des mets inventifs et sains à la cuisson parfaitement maîtrisée.Soupe de tarama avec condiment mangue et curcuma ; escargots de Bourgogne, condiment artichaut saké, bouillon thaï coco citronnelle ; glace chocolat blanc-wasabi, praliné, café, whisky… autant de variations autour des essentiels de William Ledeuil et de passerelles culinaires entre hexagone et Asie.

Das einzige 4 Haubenrestaurant Innsbrucks, geführt von Küchenchef Udo Herrmann, bietet Ihnen kreative Gerichte und spannende Weine in einer ungezwungenen Atmosphäre. Besuchen Sie uns und tauchen Sie ein in traumhafte kulinarische Sphären.

Hier können Sie österreichische Spezialitäten auf der großen Sonnenterrasse genießen, auf der Aussichtsplattform mit 360° Bergblick die Alpen bestaunen, den Start des berühmten Skirennens „Der Weiße Ring“ verfolgen oder sich nach dem Höhenrundwanderweg im Kästle-Museum auf die Spuren des Vorarlberger Skisports machen. Einzigartig, geschmackvoll und traditionell.

https://zekitchengalerie.fr/restaurant/z.description: Pêche du jour (+10€) , huîtres – raifort, jus rhubarbe – gingembre Fish of the day, oysters – horseradish, ginger – rhubarb juice
https://zekitchengalerie.fr/restaurant/z.meta_description: Le goût de l’art et l’art du goût. Cuisine ouverte sur le monde et espace d’art contemporain, l’inclassable premier restaurant de William Ledeuil a ouvert ses portes en 2001. Le guide Michelin lui décerne une 1ère étoile en 2008 et le Gault&Millau lui attribue une note de 16,5.Le cadre, urbain et arty, a été imaginé par son ami Daniel Humair, jazzman et peintre. La sobriété des lieux et du mobilier conçu par le designer Léopold Gest offre aux toiles de Daniel Humair et de Tony Soulié un bel espace d’expression.Partout présent, l’art est également au menu. Chaque assiette met en scène une composition de formes et de couleurs que l’on savoure d’abord avec les yeux.Les convives suivent le spectacle qui se joue dans la cuisine ouverte. Le chef Paul Andréjac et son équipe cosmopolite y élaborent en direct des mets inventifs et sains à la cuisson parfaitement maîtrisée.Soupe de tarama avec condiment mangue et curcuma ; escargots de Bourgogne, condiment artichaut saké, bouillon thaï coco citronnelle ; glace chocolat blanc-wasabi, praliné, café, whisky… autant de variations autour des essentiels de William Ledeuil et de passerelles culinaires entre hexagone et Asie.
headings: Le goût de l’art et l’art du goût.

https://zeffirino-restaurant.com/paris/.description: Ouvert en 1939 à Gênes, le restaurant Zeffirino est une institution renommée à travers toute l’Italie.Reconnu comme la table familiale où l’on déguste l’un des meilleurs pestos de la botte, Zeffirino se réinvente aujourd’hui à Paris grâce à Riccardo Giraudi et Mehdi Abdelhedi dans une ambiance glamour et fastueuse.
headings: Elegance à l’italienne par Cédric Capron
